senses.definition: a brush attached to a long handle that is used to clean the floor
a small flat container with a handle that is used to clean the floor of dust and waste using a brush
a stick with a long handle and a sponge or a mass of thick strings attached to its end, used for cleaning floors
a round open container, made of plastic or metal, with a handle used for keeping or carrying things

examples.x: The painter dipped his brush into the bucket of paint to start working on the walls.
We used a large bucket to collect apples during the harvest in the orchard.
The old barn had a leaky roof, so they placed buckets underneath to catch the rainwater.
The fisherman returned from the lake with a bucket full of freshly caught trout.
After the storm, they used a bucket to bail out water that had collected in the basement.

senses.definition: a porous, absorbent material made of cellulose or other materials used for cleaning, washing, or applying liquid substances
a soft, lint-free cloths made of synthetic fibers, designed for dusting, wiping, and general cleaning

examples.x: She used a microfiber cloth to wipe the dust off the glass table.
After cleaning the kitchen, he used a microfiber cloth to dry the countertops.
The microfiber cloth picked up all the dirt from the floor without leaving streaks.
I always keep a microfiber cloth in my bag to clean my phone screen.
The microfiber cloth is great for cleaning mirrors without leaving lint behind.

senses.definition: a brush covered with short, stiff bristles that is particularly used for cleaning floors

examples.x: The janitor grabbed the scrub brush to remove the stains from the bathroom tiles.
It is important to rinse the scrub brush after using it to keep it clean.
The cleaner used a scrub brush to scrub away the dirt on the walls.
The scrub brush worked well to remove the grime from the garage floor.

senses.definition: a long-handled tool with a soft, dust-attracting material on the end, used for reaching and dusting high or hard-to-reach areas

examples.x: She used a dusting wand to clean the shelves without knocking anything over.
The long handle of the dusting wand made it easy to clean the ceiling fan.
The dusting wand helped him reach the top of the cabinets where dust had built up.
After finishing the floors, she took out the dusting wand to clean the furniture.
He grabbed the dusting wand to clear away the dust from the lampshades.

senses.definition: a handheld tool with a rubber blade, used for removing liquid and cleaning solutions from windows and glass surfaces

examples.x: She used a window squeegee to clean the large glass windows in the living room.
The professional cleaner brought a window squeegee to quickly finish the job.
I always keep a window squeegee in the garage for when I need to clean the car windows.
The window squeegee made it easier to clean the windows without leaving any marks behind.
He carefully pulled the window squeegee across the glass, making sure it was spotless.

senses.definition: a handheld container with a nozzle that sprays liquids in a fine mist
a versatile cleaning solution suitable for various surfaces and general cleaning tasks

examples.x: I grabbed the all-purpose cleaner to wipe down the kitchen counters.
After using the all-purpose cleaner, the table looked spotless.
The all-purpose cleaner worked well on the bathroom sink and mirrors.
She sprayed the all-purpose cleaner on the floor before mopping it.
I always keep a bottle of all-purpose cleaner handy for quick cleanups.

senses.definition: a specialized cleaning solution formulated for cleaning and removing streaks from glass surfaces

examples.x: The glass cleaner worked well on the picture frame, removing all the dust.
After cleaning the countertop, he sprayed some glass cleaner on the table.
I always keep a bottle of glass cleaner under the sink for quick touch-ups.
The glass cleaner made the windows sparkle in the sunlight.

senses.definition: a pre-moistened disposable wipe containing disinfectant solutions, used for quick and convenient surface disinfection

examples.x: I always keep a pack of disinfecting wipes in the kitchen to clean the countertops after cooking.
Before using the public restroom, I wipe down the door handle with a disinfecting wipe.
I wiped down the grocery cart with a disinfecting wipe before putting my items inside.
He used a disinfecting wipe to clean his phone after dropping it on the floor.

senses.definition: a brush with a long handle and bristles, specifically designed for cleaning toilets

examples.x: She grabbed the toilet brush and started scrubbing the stains in the bowl.
After cleaning the bathroom, he placed the toilet brush back in its holder.
The toilet brush is kept in a corner of the bathroom for easy access.
It is important to regularly clean the toilet brush to prevent the spread of germs.
He used a toilet brush to remove the hard water stains that had built up over time.

senses.definition: a cleaning solution or gel formulated to remove stains, mineral deposits, and odors from toilet bowls

examples.x: She applied the toilet bowl cleaner and let it sit for a few minutes before scrubbing the bowl.
The toilet bowl cleaner helped remove all the stains and left the bathroom smelling fresh.
The strong smell of the toilet bowl cleaner made the whole bathroom feel clean and fresh.
I need to buy more toilet bowl cleaner since the bottle is almost empty.

senses.definition: a type of thick absorbent paper used for drying things

examples.x: I grabbed a paper towel to wipe the spill on the floor.
She used a paper towel to dry her hands after washing them.
I always keep a roll of paper towels in the kitchen.
She used a paper towel to clean up the coffee stain on the table.
He wiped the grease off the stove with a paper towel.

senses.definition: a protective glove made of rubber or latex, worn to shield hands from chemicals and potential contamination during cleaning

examples.x: She wore rubber gloves while cleaning the bathroom to protect her hands from harsh chemicals.
The workers were required to wear rubber gloves while handling hazardous materials.
The nurse put on rubber gloves before examining the patient.
After applying the paint, he removed his rubber gloves and washed his hands.
He used rubber gloves to handle the cleaning supplies to avoid skin irritation.

senses.definition: a protective mask worn over the mouth and nose to filter out dust particles and other airborne substances during cleaning

examples.x: He wore a dust mask while sanding the wooden shelves to avoid breathing in the fine particles.
The workers were required to wear dust masks while demolishing the old building.
I always use a dust mask when mowing the lawn because of the pollen in the air.
After the storm, the construction crew wore dust masks to avoid inhaling the debris.
She put on a dust mask before cleaning the attic, where there was a lot of dust.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing that is tied around the waist which protects the front part of the body from stains, dirt, etc. when working

examples.x: The baker wore a flour-dusted apron while kneading dough, ensuring her clothes stayed clean.
The blacksmith’s leather apron shielded him from sparks and hot metal during forging.
The chemist carefully adjusted her safety goggles and tied on an apron before handling corrosive chemicals.
The artist’s colorful canvas apron bore splatters of paint, evidence of countless creative sessions.

senses.definition: a cleaning solution designed specifically for deep cleaning and removing stains from carpets
a cleaning solution formulated for cleaning and maintaining different types of flooring surfaces, such as wood, tile, or laminate

examples.x: He grabbed the floor cleaner and started scrubbing the hallway.
I prefer using a natural floor cleaner to avoid harsh chemicals in the house.
The floor cleaner I use smells like lavender and leaves the floors looking shiny.
The store was out of the floor cleaner I usually buy, so I had to try a new brand.

senses.definition: a tool designed for scrubbing and removing dirt from the narrow spaces between tiles or surfaces

examples.x: I used a grout brush to clean the dirty lines between the tiles in the bathroom.
After scrubbing with the grout brush, the tiles looked like new again.
The grout brush made it much easier to remove the mold from the bathroom tiles.
She recommended using a grout brush for deep cleaning the kitchen floor.
He grabbed the grout brush to tackle the grout buildup on the kitchen backsplash.

senses.definition: a cleaning product specifically designed to remove grease, burnt-on food, and stains from ovens and stovetops

examples.x: She sprayed the oven cleaner on the walls of the oven and let it sit for 15 minutes before wiping it clean.
The oven cleaner worked wonders on the greasy stains left after baking.
He used an oven cleaner to remove the burnt food inside the oven.
The instructions on the oven cleaner bottle said to wear gloves while using it.
After using the oven cleaner, the oven looked as good as new.

senses.definition: a specialized cleaning product or solution used to clean and polish stainless steel surfaces, removing fingerprints and smudges

examples.x: I used a stainless steel cleaner to remove the fingerprints from the fridge.
The kitchen sink looks so much better after I cleaned it with a stainless steel cleaner.
Stainless steel cleaner is great for polishing the stovetop and making it shine.
She wiped the microwave with a stainless steel cleaner to get rid of the smudges.
After applying the stainless steel cleaner, the dishwasher looks brand new.

senses.definition: a substance or product that is used to remove spots or marks from fabrics, surfaces, or other materials

examples.x: She used a stain remover to get rid of the red wine stain on her favorite shirt.
The stain remover worked wonders on the coffee spill, making the carpet look brand new.
I always keep a bottle of stain remover in my laundry room for unexpected messes.
After spilling chocolate on the couch, he quickly applied the stain remover to avoid a permanent mark.
If you treat the stain right away with a good stain remover, it is more likely to come out.

senses.definition: a substance that one can rub into a surface to make it shiny and smooth
a fabric or disposable bag designed to collect and trap dust and debris, typically used with vacuum cleaners or as protective covers for storing items

examples.x: The vacuum cleaner's dust bag was full, so I had to replace it before continuing to clean.
After using the vacuum, I emptied the dust bag to get rid of all the collected dirt.
The dust bag in the cleaner was so large that it did not need to be changed for weeks.
She was careful not to tear the dust bag while removing it from the vacuum.
I noticed the vacuum wasn't picking up dirt well, so I checked the dust bag and found it was clogged.

senses.definition: a sticky roll used to remove lint and other particles from fabrics

examples.x: She grabbed the lint roller to remove the pet hair from her black sweater before heading out.
After the meeting, I used a lint roller on my jacket to get rid of the dust.
I always keep a lint roller in my car to quickly clean the seats after my dog rides with me.
Before leaving the house, she gave her dress a quick pass with the lint roller.

senses.definition: a handheld brush with bristles or an adhesive surface used to remove lint and other particles from fabrics by brushing or sweeping it over the affected area

examples.x: She grabbed the lint brush to remove the pet hair from her jacket before leaving for work.
After sitting on the couch, he used a lint brush to clean off the crumbs from his pants.
The lint brush quickly picked up the dust from the fabric seats in the car.
She ran the lint brush over her dress to make sure there were no stray fibers showing.
The lint brush is a lifesaver when trying to get rid of the fuzz on my black pants.

senses.definition: a designated container or receptacle used for collecting recyclable materials, such as paper, plastic, glass, or metal, in order to facilitate their proper recycling and reduce waste

examples.x: I always separate plastic bottles and cans into the recycle bin.
The recycle bin at work is getting full of soda cans and paper cups.
Remember to place your plastic bags in the regular trash, not the recycle bin.
The city provides each household with a blue recycle bin for paper and cardboard.
The recycle bin was overflowing with old magazines and cardboard.

senses.definition: a liquid formulated for cleaning, designed to remove dirt and stains from surfaces

examples.x: I sprayed the cleaning solution on the kitchen counter to remove the stains.
Make sure to dilute the cleaning solution with water before applying it to the floor.
He used a cleaning solution to wipe down the windows and make them shine.
The cleaning solution has a fresh scent that made the whole room smell nice.
After using the cleaning solution, the countertop looked as good as new.

senses.definition: a tool with a rubber cup fixed to a handle, used for clearing blocked pipes or drains

examples.x: He used a plunger to unclog the kitchen sink after it became blocked with food debris.
The plumber recommended using a plunger to clear the toilet blockage.
She kept a plunger handy in the bathroom cabinet for minor plumbing emergencies.
The maintenance staff used a plunger to clear the drain in the shower room.
The homeowner successfully used a plunger to fix the slow-draining bathtub.

senses.definition: a brush or a piece of cloth that is particularly used for removing dust from surfaces
